name: ui-ux-pro-max
description: AI-powered UI/UX design intelligence for web and mobile interfaces, based on nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill.

interface.shortDescription: Design intelligence for professional UI/UX work.
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin when planning, building, reviewing, or improving frontend interfaces. It packages the UI/UX Pro Max guidance for style selection, accessibility, responsive layout, typography, color systems, motion, forms, navigation, charts, and stack-specific UI implementation.
defaultPrompt: Design a polished landing page with strong accessibility and responsive behavior.
Review this UI for visual hierarchy, interaction states, and mobile usability.
Create a product-specific design system with typography, colors, spacing, and motion guidance.
